questions.question: What conservation projects or events are currently advertised?
questions.answer: Not specified in the provided sources. The events listed for Rye Brook are recreational and entertainment events (birthday celebration, ice cream Fridays, movie nights, food truck event) with no conservation projects or events advertised.
nextPrompts: Does Rye Brook have a dedicated environmental or conservation department page with project listings?
Are there any tree planting, stream cleanup, or sustainability initiatives listed elsewhere on the Rye Brook municipal website?

questions.question: What documentation or photo/videos showing past projects exists online?

What range of opportunities exist, from shared space maintenance to home landscaping to surveillance and reporting, and how easy is it for the average person to donate time or resources to get involved?

sources.title: Spring Events - Village of Rye Brook
